name: Cyclomon

signature_move.name: Hyper Heat
signature_move.description: Fires an ultra-high-temperature beam from its mouth that can melt anything.

description: A one-eyed Dragon Man Digimon with an abnormally developed right arm. It was originally a stalwart dragon warrior, but its right eye was crushed by the warrior Leomon , and it became an oni of revenge. In order to defeat Leomon, it has strengthened and enlarged its right arm, and it is on the lookout for a chance to take it down. For the sake of revenge, it has lost its pride as a warrior, leaving it as nothing more than a warrior obsessed with bloodshed. Its Special Move is its ultra-high-temperature " Hyper Heat ", which can melt anything.
